# OpenAI Python SDK Releases

## Latest Releases

**v2.30.0** (March 25, 2026)
- Computer Actions Enhancement: Added "keys field to Click/DoubleClick/Drag/Move/Scroll computer actions"
- Type System: Made type required in ResponseInputMessageItem; aligned SDK response types with expanded item schemas
- Fixed endpoint path sanitization

**v2.29.0** (March 17, 2026)
- Features include "5.4 nano and mini model slugs," addition of "/v1/videos endpoint to batches create method," "defer_loading field to ToolFunction," and "in and nin operators to ComparisonFilter type"
- Bug fixes addressed typing-extensions versioning and pydantic by_alias parameter handling

**v2.28.0** (March 13, 2026)
- Introduced custom voices functionality

**v2.27.0** (March 13, 2026)
- Featured "sora api improvements: character api, video extensions/edits, higher resolution exports"
- Repaired merged videos resource and included multiple codegen updates

**v2.26.0** (March 5, 2026)
- ComputerTool class moved to GA; computer_use_preview transitioned to ComputerUsePreview

**v2.25.0** (March 5, 2026)
- Added "gpt-5.4, tool search tool, and new computer tool"
- Removed prompt_cache_key param from responses; adjusted message type phases

**v2.24.0** (February 24, 2026)
- Introduced phase field functionality with associated bug fixes and documentation

**v2.23.0** (February 24, 2026)
- Added "gpt-realtime-1.5 and gpt-audio-1.5 model options to realtime calls"

**v2.22.0** (February 23, 2026)
- Implemented "websockets for responses api"
- Enhanced documentation across audio, chat, realtime, skills, uploads, and videos methods

**v2.21.0** (February 13, 2026)
- Added "container network_policy and skills"
- Resolved memory leak in structured outputs parse methods

**v2.20.0** (February 10, 2026)
- Introduced "support for images in batch api"

## Build/Test Infrastructure
- Transitioned testing framework from Prism to Steady

Updated: 2026-04-05
